testcase.name: test_admin_driver_earnings_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing 'pending_payouts' in response assert 'pending_payouts' in {'current_month': '2026-03', 'drivers_count': 0, 'earnings': [], 'payout_day': 10, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration6_earnings.py:169: in test_admin_driver_earnings_endpoint_exists assert "pending_payouts" in data, "Missing 'pending_payouts' in response" E AssertionError: Missing 'pending_payouts' in response E assert 'pending_payouts' in {'current_month': '2026-03', 'drivers_count': 0, 'earnings': [], 'payout_day': 10, ...}

testcase.name: test_admin_process_payouts_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing 'payouts' in response assert 'payouts' in {'errors': [], 'errors_count': 0, 'processed': [], 'processed_count': 0, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration6_earnings.py:247: in test_admin_process_payouts_endpoint_exists assert "payouts" in data, "Missing 'payouts' in response" E AssertionError: Missing 'payouts' in response E assert 'payouts' in {'errors': [], 'errors_count': 0, 'processed': [], 'processed_count': 0, ...}
